purpose: Freeze the first SK financial-seed questions used to evaluate whether the Hanwha/Samsung advisor template can route SK affiliates and select OpenDART financial seed claims before SK narrative IR sources are promoted.

paperUse.allowedClaim: SK demonstrates that the template can begin transfer once DART/KRX identifiers and financial seed claims are verified.
paperUse.notAllowedClaim: These scenarios do not prove SK narrative IR coverage, HBM strategy coverage, SK Innovation energy/battery coverage, telecom AI coverage, or Samsung-level first-transfer completeness.
paperUse.expansionNote: SK should receive a reference-slice scenario only after official document-level IR URLs and narrative source-backed claims are promoted.

answerPolicy: Answer must be investor-facing Korean prose, not development-status prose.
Answer must not expose raw source-backed claim IDs.
Answer must disclose when latest news or market data is not connected live.
When an SK affiliate is named, representativeCompanyId must route to that affiliate.
Named-affiliate questions must not pull unrelated SK affiliate financial claims just to fill the maximum claim count.
runtimeAssumptions.claimMatchPolicy: expectedClaimIds are minimum required source-backed claims. For named-affiliate SK financial questions, unrelated affiliate claims should be excluded.

scenarios.title: SK Hynix 2024 financial turnaround
scenarios.question: SK하이닉스 2024년 실적 회복을 OpenDART 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Hynix questions route to SK Hynix and select only Hynix financial seed claims.

scenarios.title: SK Innovation 2024 financial baseline
scenarios.question: SK이노베이션 2024년 연결 실적을 OpenDART 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Innovation questions route to SK Innovation and select only SK Innovation financial seed claims.

scenarios.title: SK Inc. 2024 financial baseline
scenarios.question: SK 2024년 연결 실적을 OpenDART 기준으로 정리해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Inc. questions route to the listed holding company and select holding-company financial seed claims.

scenarios.title: SK Telecom 2024 financial baseline
scenarios.question: SK텔레콤 2024년 연결 실적을 OpenDART 기준으로 요약해줘
scenarios.intent: Check whether SK Telecom questions route to SK Telecom and select telecom financial seed claims.
